title: Arcane Artistry
body:
# Join the magical world of Arcane Artistry
Arcane Artistry is a magic mod that aims at turning the act of casting spells into a more interactive experience. Harnessing the magical powers of lapis lazuli spells are cast by moving the staff into the respective pattern e.g. up, down, left, right for a fireball.

# Spells
There are currently 14 unique spells ranging from launching oneself into the air to disarming the opponent with a lot more to be added until the full release.

# What's more to come?
As we are still in early alpha
After releasing version 1.0 we have more features to come:
- Alchemy Spells
- Spell casting automation

# What are you waiting for?
**Download Arcane Artistry now and experience a new way of spell casting.**
